name: ICGEM Global Gravity Field Models Service
provider: GFZ German Research Centre for Geosciences; International Centre for Global Earth Models
theme_raw: spherical harmonic gravity/geoid models
license: ICGEM/GFZ data-service terms; model-specific licenses and citations
formats: GFC spherical-harmonic coefficient files, calculation service outputs, metadata pages
access: web portal / model download / calculation service; ICGEM home https://icgem.gfz.de/; long-time models https://icgem.gfz.de/tom_longtime; calculation grids https://icgem.gfz.de/calcgrid; simulated models https://icgem.gfz.de/sl/simulated
doi_or_citation: ICGEM service; cite individual model records
scale: model-dependent maximum degree/order
evidence: ICGEM long-time model table lists downloadable global gravity-field models and metadata. v123 verified ICGEM home, long-time model table, calculation-grid service and simulated-model table as active authority-source leads. ICGEM/GFZ records assign DOI metadata and provide model/download or scenario-series links for individual datasets. v124 checked https://icgem.gfz.de/changes and https://icgem.gfz.de/tom_longtime. Latest Changes lists 2026-06-23 new static model CNES_GRGS.RL05MF_u202601 and CNES GRACE/GRACE-FO RL05 models for 2024-09 to 2026-02; the long-time table lists the static model as 2026, degree 300, satellite data, with gfc, zip, calculate and 3D routes.
notes: Canonical discovery and access route for global static/long-time mean gravity models. Individual model rows are added only when they have distinct stable landing pages or strong evidence. v123 refresh: official ICGEM pages were rechecked as the canonical discovery/access lead for static, temporal, simulated and topographic gravity-field models; HUST-Grace2026s and MAGIC Level-2a were handled as model-level records rather than duplicating the collection row. v124 refresh: ICGEM Latest Changes and long-time model table were checked for 2026 updates; CNES_GRGS.RL05MF_u202601 was added as a model-level row because it is a newly listed static model with GFC/ZIP downloads but no DOI icon in the model table.
desc_zh: ICGEM 全球重力场模型服务汇集大量静态和长期平均地球重力场球谐模型，可按模型下载系数文件并查看元数据。该入口适合作为全球大地水准面、重力异常、扰动位和相关派生量计算的骨干来源。首版把它作为模型集合级数据源，后续再对重要单模型做细分。
desc_en: The ICGEM global gravity field model service is the main GFZ-hosted catalogue for static and long-term mean Earth gravity-field models. It provides downloadable spherical-harmonic coefficient files, model metadata, and calculation services for geoid, gravity anomaly, disturbing potential, and related quantities. This row is treated as the canonical collection-level access point; high-value individual models can be split out when they have stable model pages and distinct evidence.

provider: GFZ German Research Centre for Geosciences; ICGEM

license: ICGEM/GFZ data-service terms; product-specific citations
formats: GFC coefficient series, time-variable model metadata, service outputs
access: web portal / model download / calculation service
doi_or_citation: ICGEM time-variable model service; cite individual model records
time_span: GRACE/GRACE-FO era and selected auxiliary temporal products
scale: monthly to model-dependent temporal resolution; spherical-harmonic degree/order varies
evidence: ICGEM exposes time-variable/temporal gravity-model collections and calculation routes.
notes: Kept separate from PO.DAAC Level-2 rows because ICGEM is a model-service catalogue and calculator rather than a mission archive.
desc_zh: ICGEM 时间变重力模型服务面向 GRACE、GRACE-FO 及相关时间序列重力场模型，提供系数序列和计算服务入口。它适合追踪水储量变化、冰盖质量变化、海洋质量变化等时变重力应用中的模型版本。首版保留为集合级入口，避免与 PO.DAAC 的任务级 Level-2 产品重复。
desc_en: The ICGEM time-variable gravity service covers temporal gravity-field model series, especially products derived from GRACE and GRACE-FO. It provides access to coefficient series and calculation routes useful for studies of terrestrial water storage, ice-mass change, ocean mass variability, and other mass-redistribution signals. It is kept as a collection-level model-service row, distinct from mission archive records at PO.DAAC.

name: NGA Earth Gravitational Model 2008 (EGM2008)
provider: National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency (NGA)
theme_raw: EGM2008 high-degree geopotential model
license: U.S. government public release / NGA terms
formats: coefficient files, grids and supporting WGS 84 geodesy resources
access: direct-download / web page
doi_or_citation: Pavlis et al. EGM2008; NGA WGS 84 resources
scale: degree/order 2190 with selected coefficients to 2159/2190 depending on distribution
evidence: NGA WGS 84 Earth Gravitational Model resources provide the EGM2008 access page.
notes: EGM2008 remains a widely used reference geopotential model for geoid undulation and gravity-related geodetic reductions.
desc_zh: EGM2008 是 NGA 发布的高阶全球地球重力场模型，长期作为大地水准面高、重力异常和 WGS 84 相关大地测量计算的参考模型。页面提供模型和支撑资料入口，适合工程测绘、GNSS 高程转换和全球重力背景场应用。
desc_en: EGM2008 is the high-degree global geopotential model released by NGA and widely used for geoid undulation, gravity anomaly, and WGS 84 related geodetic computations. The NGA page provides the authoritative access route for model resources and supporting documentation. It remains a core reference for engineering geodesy, GNSS height conversion, and background gravity-field work.

provider: GFZ Potsdam; GRGS Toulouse; Technical University of Munich and partners
theme_raw: EIGEN-6C4 combined satellite-terrestrial-altimetry model
license: GFZ data services terms; cite model publication/record
formats: GFC coefficient file, metadata landing page
access: data-service landing page / download
doi_or_citation: Förste et al. EIGEN-6C4; GFZ Data Services record
scale: degree/order 2190
evidence: GFZ Data Services exposes an ICGEM short record for EIGEN-6C4.
notes: Accepted as an individual row because it has a stable GFZ data-service landing page and is a widely used combined model.
desc_zh: EIGEN-6C4 是一个全球组合重力场模型，融合卫星重力、卫星测高和地面重力等信息，提供高阶球谐系数。它常用于全球大地水准面、重力异常和地球物理背景场计算。该条采用 GFZ Data Services 的稳定模型记录作为入口。
desc_en: EIGEN-6C4 is a global combined gravity-field model that integrates satellite gravity, satellite altimetry, and terrestrial gravity information into high-degree spherical-harmonic coefficients. It is widely used for geoid, gravity anomaly, and background-field calculations. The row uses the GFZ Data Services model record as the stable landing and evidence page.

desc_zh: ICGEM 的地形/起伏相关重力模型集合提供由地形质量、起伏面或相关地形改正构建的全球模型入口。它对 Bouguer 改正、地形影响分析、区域重力解释和高分辨率背景场建模很有用。首版按集合收录，后续再拆分有独立 DOI 或下载页的重要模型。
desc_en: The ICGEM topographic and relief-related model collection provides access to global models built from terrain mass, relief surfaces, or related topographic corrections. These products are useful for Bouguer correction, terrain-effect analysis, regional gravity interpretation, and high-resolution background-field modeling. The row is collection-level, with individual models split out only where stable evidence warrants it.

desc_zh: GRACE Level-2 Monthly Gravity Field Spherical Harmonics: JPL RL06 提供月尺度重力场球谐系数，是从 GRACE/GRACE-FO 双星任务反演地球质量重新分布的核心 Level-2 产品。它可用于水储量、冰川冰盖、海洋质量和固体地球变化研究，下载通常通过 NASA Earthdata/PO.DAAC 完成。首版按处理中心和任务版本分别收录，不把单月 granule 拆成数据集。
desc_en: GRACE Level-2 Monthly Gravity Field Spherical Harmonics: JPL RL06 provides monthly gravity-field spherical harmonics from the GRACE or GRACE-FO twin-satellite missions. These Level-2 products are fundamental for estimating changes in terrestrial water storage, ice sheets and glaciers, ocean mass, and solid-Earth mass redistribution. Access is through NASA Earthdata and PO.DAAC, and the atlas records the official processing-center products rather than individual monthly granules.

desc_en: JPL Tellus GRACE/GRACE-FO Mascon Ocean and Land Mass Grids RL06.3 v04 is a gridded mass-change product derived from GRACE/GRACE-FO gravity observations for land, ice, or ocean mass applications. desc_en: BGI Gravity Maps is the Bureau Gravimétrique International product page for global and regional gravity map products, including World Gravity Map related resources and derivative maps. It complements the broader BGI grids/models collection by emphasizing map-product discovery and access.

The DOI currently resolves through an older PO.DAAC redirect; the stable HTTPS PO.DAAC landing page checked in v008 is https://podaac.jpl.nasa.gov/dataset/TELLUS_OCEAN_NC_RL05. Official GEE tag pages for gravity and grace list Ocean EOFR, RL06 v04 Land, RL06 v04 Ocean, Global Mascons, and Global Mascon CRI Filtered; this confirms the existing GEE backbone without adding duplicate rows. v067 rechecked official Google Earth Engine gravity/grace tag pages and the Global Mascons / Global Mascon CRI dataset pages; GEE remains an access mirror or cloud-analysis route for the same NASA/JPL/PO.DAAC products.

It should not be used for global mean ocean mass spatial averaging, per the provider note. v008 URL verification used the GEE catalog page plus the stable HTTPS PO.DAAC landing page because the DOI resolver redirects through an older HTTP PO.DAAC route that can time out in lychee. v015 review checked Google Earth Engine official gravity/grace tag pages on 2026-06-29; official GEE coverage remains the five GRACE datasets already represented in this catalog, so this row was refreshed rather than duplicated. v067 rechecked official Google Earth Engine gravity/grace tag pages and the Global Mascons / Global Mascon CRI catalog pages; the GEE gravity set remains represented by existing GRACE rows, so records were refreshed rather than duplicated.

desc_en: Google Earth Engine GRACE Monthly Mass Grids - Ocean EOFR is a cloud-analysis entry for a NASA JPL/GRACE Tellus ocean-mass grid product filtered through empirical orthogonal-function reconstruction. It targets regional ocean bottom pressure analysis and exposes CSR, GFZ, and JPL equivalent-water-thickness bands as an Earth Engine ImageCollection. The row is added as a Google Earth Engine gravity-data gap fill because the product has a DOI-backed source, a distinct processing boundary, and a stable GEE asset identifier.

The atlas records it as a global temporal-gravity service with registration-based access rather than anonymous bulk download.

desc_en: SGB Borborema Province Bouguer Gravity GeoTIFF Images is a regional Bouguer gravity-anomaly raster package for the Borborema Province distributed by SGB/CPRM through GeoSGB/RIGeo. GeoSGB controller id 3829 resolves to a ZIP GeoTIFF package, and direct content inspection showed `Anomalia_Gravimetrica_Bouguer.tif` as the first ZIP entry. The row is included as a regional Bouguer anomaly GeoTIFF dataset rather than a map-only PDF record.

desc_zh: AUSGeoid2020 是 Geoscience Australia 发布的澳大利亚国家大地水准面/准大地水准面模型，用于把 GNSS 椭球高转换到 Australian Height Datum（AHD）高度。官方页面说明该模型是重力-几何组合模型，其中重力部分为 1 角分格网，使用 GRACE、GOCE、卫星测高、航空重力、澳大利亚国家重力数据库陆地重力和 DEM 等资料构建。数据以 NTv2 GSB、误差格网和 Windows DAT 等文件公开下载，页面元数据标注 CC BY 4.0。
desc_en: AUSGeoid2020 is Geoscience Australia’s national geoid/quasigeoid model for transforming GNSS ellipsoidal heights to Australian Height Datum (AHD) heights. The official page describes it as a combined gravimetric-geometric model whose gravimetric component is a 1 arc-minute grid built from GRACE and GOCE satellite gravity missions, retracked satellite altimetry, airborne gravity, land gravity from the Australian National Gravity Database, and a DEM. Data are publicly downloadable as NTv2 GSB, error-grid, and Windows DAT files, with the page metadata marked CC BY 4.0.

Data are publicly downloadable from the OS coordinate-transformation resources page as developer-pack and OSGM15 GTX ZIP files.

The GOCE data page states that GOCE Level-1B and Level-2 collections are freely available under ESA Earth Observation Data Policy. v034 verified both pages.
notes: Accepted as the official upstream GOCE Level-1B mission data collection. It complements the existing GOCE Level-2 gravity-gradient row and derived global gravity-field model/grid row, and should not be confused with GOCE telemetry, thermosphere, TEC/ROTI or re-entry special datasets.
desc_zh: ESA GOCE Level-1B Gradiometer and Precise Orbit Input Data 是欧洲航天局 GOCE 任务的一级数据集合，包含重力梯度仪、星敏感器、GPS 接收机、磁强计、磁力矩器以及每个重力梯度仪加速度计的 DFACS 数据。它是生成 GOCE Level-2 重力梯度、精密轨道和全球重力场模型的重要上游输入，通过 ESA Earth Online 开放获取，通常需要 EO Sign In 注册。
desc_en: ESA GOCE Level-1B Gradiometer and Precise Orbit Input Data is the official European Space Agency upstream GOCE mission collection containing Level-1B gradiometer, star-tracker, GPS receiver, magnetometer, magnetotorquer and accelerometer/DFACS data. It is a key input for GOCE Level-2 gravity gradients, precise orbit products and derived global gravity-field models, and is available through ESA Earth Online subject to EO Sign In terms.

desc_zh: 该 USGS ScienceBase 数据集包含 2015-2019 年在亚利桑那州 Coconino Plateau 采集的重力观测及归算结果，用于估计构造带增强孔隙度可能宽度。数据包括相对重力测量、邻近绝对重力站约束和网络平差结果，适合地下水、构造和盆地结构研究。
desc_en: This USGS ScienceBase dataset contains gravity observations and reductions collected on the Coconino Plateau, Arizona, from 2015 to 2019 to estimate possible widths of enhanced porosity zones across structures. evidence: Refreshed in v114 after DOI/Data Catalog discovery showed this candidate was already represented at row 248, so no duplicate row was added. USGS/Data Catalog and ScienceBase item 61ae617ed34eb622f69a7276 identify DOI 10.5066/P9DJ23US, title Repeat microgravity data from Anza Valley, California, 2019-2023, citation Ely, C.P., Kennedy, J.R., and Christensen, A.H., 2025, and data dates 2019-12-03 to 2023-09-11. ScienceBase summary states that the release contains network-adjusted relative- and absolute-gravity survey results in and near Anza Valley, California; relative surveys used a Zero Length Spring Burris relative-gravity meter; absolute surveys used a Micro-g LaCoste A-10; solid Earth tides and ocean loading were removed; nonlinear relative-meter drift was removed by repeated base-station measurements; and GSadjust least-squares network adjustment combined relative-gravity differences with absolute-gravity data. ScienceBase rights field marks the work as Creative Commons Zero v1.0 Universal. Downloaded https://www.sciencebase.gov/catalog/file/get/61ae617ed34eb622f69a7276 on 2026-07-13; ZIP contained Anza_AdjustedGravity_2019-2023.csv 4,924 bytes md5 6b2cd14412848de169803de419cf7505 and Anza_AdjustedGravity_2019-2023.xml 19,613 bytes md5 e93799020ce64f965954f40b92be7064, both matching the ScienceBase inventory. CSV parsing found 35 nonblank station rows, 35 unique station names, and no duplicate station names. Coordinate ranges from CSV are latitude 33.53998-33.57725 and longitude -116.70092 to -116.63078. Survey-date gravity value counts are 2019-12-03 35, 2020-09-21 35, 2021-04-27 34, 2021-08-31 35, 2022-03-30 34, 2022-11-01 28, and 2023-09-11 5; 5 stations have values for all seven gravity-date columns. Gravity values across parsed columns range from 979263124.0 to 979292924.5. FGDC XML lists access constraints as None and use constraints as None with a metadata limitation advising users to read the metadata; XML begdate/enddate are 20200921/20230911, while the tabular gravity columns include 2019-12-03. FGDC west/east bounds match the CSV range, but the northbc/southbc values appear numerically reversed relative to latitude range, so CSV-derived latitude range is used in this catalog note. v114 URL verification excluded the advertised ScienceBase WMS GetCapabilities URL because lychee received 404 Not Found.
notes: v114 quality refresh only: this DOI/Data Catalog lead was already represented from v046 as ScienceBase item 61ae617ed34eb622f69a7276, so the catalog row was updated in place and no duplicate was added. Use the ScienceBase item and DOI as canonical references. The FGDC metadata date range starts at 2020-09-21 although the CSV contains a 2019-12-03 gravity column; FGDC northbc/southbc values appear reversed relative to the CSV latitudes. These source-metadata issues are recorded without changing source values. v114 lychee found the advertised ScienceBase WMS GetCapabilities URL returned 404, so WMS was excluded from the verified URL list.
desc_zh: 该 USGS 数据发布提供加利福尼亚 Anza Valley 及邻近区域 2019-2023 年重复微重力观测的网络平差结果。数据包包含 35 个站点的 CSV 表和 FGDC 元数据，结合相对重力仪与 A-10 绝对重力观测，可用于地下水储量变化与时变重力分析。
desc_en: This USGS data release provides network-adjusted repeat microgravity results for 35 stations in and near Anza Valley, California, from 2019 to 2023. The ScienceBase package includes CSV data and FGDC metadata derived from relative-gravity and A-10 absolute-gravity surveys for groundwater-storage and time-variable gravity studies.

desc_zh: 该 NASA GES DISC GRACE-DA-DM 全球产品由 NASA Goddard 团队把 GRACE/GRACE-FO 陆地水储量观测同化进 Catchment Land Surface Model，用于每周地下水、根区土壤水分和表层土壤水分旱涝百分位指标。数据覆盖约 60°S 至 90°N 的全球陆地区域，0.25° NetCDF 格网自 2003 年 2 月持续更新，可通过 GES DISC、OPeNDAP、Earthdata Search 和 Giovanni 获取。
desc_en: This NASA GES DISC GRACE-DA-DM global product assimilates GRACE/GRACE-FO terrestrial water storage observations into the Catchment Land Surface Model to produce weekly groundwater, root-zone soil-moisture, and surface soil-moisture percentile drought indicators. It covers global land from about 60S to 90N as 0.25-degree NetCDF grids from February 2003 onward, with access through GES DISC, OPeNDAP, Earthdata Search, and Giovanni.

desc_zh: 该 NASA GES DISC GRACE-DA-DM 美国产品利用 GRACE 与 GRACE-FO RL06 mascon 解同化到 Catchment Land Surface Model，生成地下水、根区土壤水分和表层土壤水分旱涝百分位指标。V4.0 以 0.125° NetCDF 格网覆盖美国/北美区域，自 2002 年 4 月持续更新，并通过 GES DISC、OPeNDAP、Earthdata Search 和 Giovanni 提供访问。
desc_en: This NASA GES DISC GRACE-DA-DM U.S. product assimilates GRACE and GRACE-FO RL06 mascon solutions into the Catchment Land Surface Model to generate groundwater, root-zone soil-moisture, and surface soil-moisture percentile drought indicators. Version 4.0 is distributed as 0.125-degree NetCDF grids over the U.S./North America domain from April 2002 onward, with access through GES DISC, OPeNDAP, Earthdata Search, and Giovanni.

coverage: global low-degree gravity coefficients; GRACE/GRACE-FO era monthly estimates
license: NASA/PO.DAAC or CSR public technical-note data; cite provider and referenced papers
formats: plain-text technical-note data file with monthly coefficient estimates
access: Direct public CSR Filedrop text file; referenced from PO.DAAC GRACE Technical Notes
doi_or_citation: GRACE Technical Note #11E; Cheng and Ries; CSR SLR monthly C20/C30 estimates for GRACE/GRACE-FO RL06.X products
scale: monthly low-degree spherical-harmonic replacement coefficients C20 and C30
evidence: PO.DAAC GRACE Technical Notes page links TN-11E and states it should be used to replace C20 values, and C30 values starting March 2012, from GRACE(-FO) RL06.X GSM files. v060 lychee reports the URL successful.
notes: Accepted because PO.DAAC documentation identifies TN-11E as the replacement C20/C30 estimates for GRACE(-FO) RL06.X GSM files. Python SSL probing could not verify the CSR certificate chain locally, but lychee validated the public URL successfully.
desc_zh: 该 CSR TN-11E 数据文件提供基于 SLR 的月尺度 C20 与 C30 替代系数，用于替换 GRACE/GRACE-FO RL06.X GSM 文件中的低阶项。它是 PO.DAAC GRACE Technical Notes 页面列出的官方辅助数据，对使用 Level-2 球谐系数进行质量变化反演时的低阶项处理很关键。
desc_en: This CSR TN-11E data file provides SLR-based monthly C20 and C30 replacement coefficients for GRACE/GRACE-FO RL06.X GSM files. It is listed on the PO.DAAC GRACE Technical Notes page as an official ancillary product and is important for low-degree handling in Level-2 spherical-harmonic mass-change analysis.

time_span: AOD1B RL06.03 monthly/nominal time series; file updated 2026-06-02; checked 2026-06-29
scale: global ocean mean correction values for GRACE ocean bottom pressure to ocean mass conversion
evidence: The file header states it converts global mean OBP to global mean ocean mass using AOD1B GAD fields and is needed for global sea-level budget analyses. v060 lychee validates the stable PO.DAAC archive origin URL.
notes: Accepted as an ancillary gravity/ocean-mass correction time series. The stable archive URL redirects to a temporary signed CloudFront download URL; the signed target is intentionally not catalogued.
desc_zh: 该 PO.DAAC GRACE TN-12 文本数据提供从全球平均海底压力转换为全球平均海洋质量所需的大气负荷修正值，数据来源为 AOD1B RL06.03 GAD 场。它用于使 GRACE 海洋质量估计与 IB 校正后的测高海平面观测一致，是海平面收支分析中的重要辅助时间序列。
desc_en: This PO.DAAC GRACE TN-12 text dataset provides atmospheric-load correction values for converting global mean ocean bottom pressure to global mean ocean mass, using AOD1B RL06.03 GAD fields. It supports consistency between GRACE ocean-mass estimates and inverse-barometer-corrected altimetry and is an important ancillary time series for sea-level budget studies.

desc_en: This PO.DAAC GRACE TN-13a file provides monthly degree-1 geocenter gravity coefficients generated from CSR RL06.2 GRACE/GRACE-FO solutions. Because degree-1 terms are not directly recovered robustly from standard GRACE Level-2 solutions, this file is an important ancillary product for mass-change inversion and geocenter correction.

access: Direct public NASA GSFC text file linked from GSFC SLR data page
doi_or_citation: NASA GSFC SLR 5x5+C61/S61 time variable gravity; Loomis et al. 2020, Geophysical Research Letters, doi:10.1029/2019GL085488

desc_en: This NASA GSFC text dataset provides SLR-derived 5x5+C61/S61 time-variable gravity Stokes coefficients using 28-day sliding-window solutions at a 7-day time step. The file header documents the 2000-01 to 2026-04 data span, 1368 epochs, satellite set, format, constants, and Loomis et al. citation, supporting low- to medium-low-degree time-variable gravity analysis.

evidence: NASA GSFC SLR data page links the file. File header identifies date created 2026-01-28, data span, TSVD/TSVD MM variables, recommended solution, satellite set, format, and Loomis et al. 2025 citation. v061 lychee validates the URL with no redirects.

desc_zh: 该 NASA GSFC 长期 C20 数据集提供基于 SLR 的 28 天或 56 天 C20 估计，使用 TSVD 和 TSVD MM 方法，其中 TSVD MM 为推荐解。文件覆盖 1976 年 6 月至 2025 年 11 月，基于 LAGEOS-1/2 与 LARES-2 等中高轨 SLR 卫星，适合研究地球扁率低阶重力项的长期变化。
desc_en: This NASA GSFC long-term C20 dataset provides SLR-derived 28-day or 56-day C20 estimates using TSVD and TSVD MM methods, with TSVD MM recommended in the file header. It spans June 1976 to November 2025 using LAGEOS-1/2 and LARES-2 class MEO SLR satellites, supporting long-term analysis of Earth oblateness and low-degree gravity variability.

name: COST-G Fitted Signal Model Gravity Field Series

doi_or_citation: Peter, H., Meyer, U., Lasser, M., and Jäggi, A. 2022. COST-G gravity field models for precise orbit determination of Low Earth Orbiting Satellites. Advances in Space Research 69(12), DOI 10.1016/j.asr.2022.04.005
time_span: Quarterly files visible through 2021-06 to 2026-03 at 2026-06-29 check; series is updated by ICGEM/COST-G
scale: quarterly global spherical-harmonic gravity-field models distributed as .gfc files
evidence: ICGEM temporal model index lists COST-G - FSM as Fitted Signal Model with a monthly/series route. The dedicated page provides citation, DOI link, full zip download, quarterly subset, and individual .gfc files. v062 lychee verified the ICGEM landing/download URLs successfully.

desc_zh: COST-G Fitted Signal Model 是 ICGEM/COST-G 发布的全球时变重力场模型序列，面向低轨卫星精密定轨等应用。ICGEM 页面提供完整 zip、季度子集和单个 `.gfc` 球谐系数文件，并给出 Peter 等 2022 的引用与 DOI；它不同于已收录的 COST-G GRACE/GRACE-FO RL02 组合月场。
desc_en: The COST-G Fitted Signal Model is a global time-variable gravity-field model series distributed by ICGEM/COST-G for applications such as precise orbit determination of low Earth orbiting satellites. The ICGEM page provides full-series zip downloads, quarterly subsets, and individual `.gfc` spherical-harmonic coefficient files with the Peter et al. 2022 citation and DOI. It is distinct from the already catalogued COST-G GRACE/GRACE-FO RL02 monthly combination series.

evidence: The AGS/AER ArcGIS Hub item describes the Alberta Aeromagnetic and Gravity Survey, states the page covers project scope and data available for download, and gives Open Government Licence - Alberta attribution information. The Hub page data JSON says the 2021-2023 program made nearly 900,000 line km of magnetic data and about 134,000 line km of gravity data available for free download and viewing. The StoryMap collection extends the program description to 2021-2024 and states raw and processed data can be downloaded in Geosoft Database, ASCII grid, Shapefile, File Geodatabase, ArcGIS Pro packages, PDF and GeoTIFF formats. v069 verified the ArcGIS metadata/data JSON and six direct Northern Alberta gravity ZIP packages.
notes: Accepted in v069 as a real provincial airborne gravity dataset. Southern Alberta links in the same hub are aeromagnetic-only and were not used as gravity evidence; this row is anchored to the direct gravity-survey-2022 Northern Alberta data packages.

desc_en: Alberta Geological Survey Northern Alberta Airborne Gravity Survey 2022 is the gravity-data component of the AGS/AER Alberta airborne geophysics program. The official ArcGIS Hub and StoryMap state that about 134,000 line km of gravity data are available for free download; v069 verified the complete, raw/grid, raster/contour, georeferenced-map, ArcGIS Pro layer and map package ZIP files. The record is kept under the Open Government Licence - Alberta attribution requirement.

evidence: NSW GeoNetwork metadata for NSW Bouguer Gravity and NSW Bouguer gravity first vertical derivative states that the 2024 statewide gravity merge is a compilation of best available airborne and ground data, roughly 80% airborne and 20% ground. AIR1027 and AIR1030 comprise the airborne data, while ground data are clipped from Geoscience Australia's ANGD dataset. The data are gridded at 500 x 500 m and corrected for isostasy following Spence and Musgrave (2006), with units of μm s-2. The records warn users to use filenames containing 2024-10-30 because v2 remedied location errors in the initial release. v072 verified both GeoNetwork metadata records plus direct Bouguer and 1VD ERS ZIP and RGBA GeoTIFF files.
notes: Accepted in v072 as one dataset family because the Bouguer and 1VD products share the same NSW statewide gravity merge lineage and release. Overlay-only TIF records combining gravity with tilt-angle magnetics were retained as contextual evidence and not split into separate rows.
desc_zh: NSW Statewide Gravity Merge 2024 是 Geological Survey of New South Wales 发布的新南威尔士州级重力合并产品。元数据说明该版本汇集最佳可用航空与地面重力数据，约 80% 来自航空、20% 来自地面，航空部分包括 AIR1027 和 AIR1030，地面部分来自 Geoscience Australia 的 ANGD，网格分辨率为 500 x 500 m，并按 Spence and Musgrave (2006) 进行均衡校正。v072 验证了 Bouguer 和一阶垂向导数的 GeoNetwork 元数据、ERS ZIP 与 RGBA GeoTIFF 下载。
desc_en: NSW Statewide Gravity Merge 2024 is a Geological Survey of New South Wales statewide gravity product family. The metadata says the release compiles the best available airborne and ground gravity data, roughly 80% airborne and 20% ground, with AIR1027 and AIR1030 as airborne sources and Geoscience Australia's ANGD as the ground source; the data are gridded at 500 x 500 m and corrected for isostasy following Spence and Musgrave (2006). v072 verified the Bouguer and first-vertical-derivative GeoNetwork records plus ERS ZIP and RGBA GeoTIFF downloads.

The metadata PDF describes Gravity Grids of the Northern Territory as spherical-cap Bouguer anomaly gravity and derived grids interpolated from over 275,000 ground gravity readings acquired by NT Government, Commonwealth and industry sources since the 1950s. It lists 100 m grid cell size, station spacing from about 11 km to less than 500 m, AAGD07 formula at density 2670 kg/m3, CSV and ESRI shapefile input data, ERS and GeoTIFF grid products including Bouguer, 1VD, upward-continued and residual variants. v074 extracted the hidden PDF annotation URL for the direct NT-wide-gravity-grids.zip and verified the GEMIS page, PDFs and 4.94 GB ZIP with lychee/HEAD.
notes: Accepted in v074 after v073 deferred it for lack of a direct data package. The real ZIP link was embedded as a PDF link annotation in NT-GravityGrids2026-Download-Link.pdf rather than exposed in text extraction.

desc_en: NT-wide Geophysical Stitch Gravity Grids 2026 is a Northern Territory Geological Survey statewide gravity grid and station compilation. The metadata says it interpolates spherical-cap Bouguer anomaly and derived grids from more than 275,000 ground gravity readings acquired by NT Government, Commonwealth and industry sources since the 1950s, using the AAGD07 formula with 2670 kg/m3 density. It provides 100 m ERS/GeoTIFF Bouguer, 1VD, upward-continued and residual grids plus CSV/SHP input point data. v074 extracted the hidden PDF annotation for the 4.94 GB ZIP and verified the GEMIS page, PDFs and direct ZIP.

evidence: The State Growth ArcGIS REST Geophysics service lists a Gravity Measurements layer with Query and Data capabilities. The layer description says it contains measurement locations from gravity surveys conducted in Tasmania, including height above sea level, observed gravity, calculated complete Bouguer anomaly values and terrain correction, with approximately 85,000 stations. A returnCountOnly query on 2026-06-29 returned 83,474 records, and layer fields include OBSERV_GRAVITY, THEOR_GRAVITY, BOUGUER_ANOMALY and TERRAIN_CORR. The ArcGIS layer iteminfo exposes licenseInfo as Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 Australia Licence.
notes: Accepted in v075 as the official maintained Tasmanian gravity-measurement feature service after prior MRT webpage attempts were blocked by 403/Cloudflare. This row represents the state service layer, not a static ZIP; users can query/export features through ArcGIS REST in JSON, GeoJSON or PBF. The general MRT digital-data page was excluded from the lychee URL list because lychee received 403; v075 instead used the layer iteminfo licence endpoint. It is distinct from GA/NCI survey-level NetCDF records because it is a current MRT/LISTmap maintained service with 83,474 measurement records.
desc_zh: Mineral Resources Tasmania Gravity Measurements Feature Layer 是塔斯马尼亚州官方 MRT/State Growth ArcGIS REST 地球物理服务中的重力测点图层。图层说明其包含塔斯马尼亚重力调查测点的位置、海拔、观测重力、理论重力、完整 Bouguer 异常和地形改正等字段，服务端计数查询在 2026-06-29 返回 83,474 条记录，图层说明约 85,000 个站点。v075 验证了 REST 图层、计数查询和 MRT 数据使用页，许可按 MRT Digital Data 条款为 CC BY 3.0 AU。
desc_en: Mineral Resources Tasmania Gravity Measurements Feature Layer is the official gravity measurement layer in the Tasmanian MRT/State Growth ArcGIS REST geophysics service. The layer describes gravity survey locations in Tasmania with elevation, observed gravity, theoretical gravity, complete Bouguer anomaly and terrain correction fields; a server count query on 2026-06-29 returned 83,474 records, consistent with the service description of about 85,000 stations. v075 verified the REST layer, count query and MRT data-use page under CC BY 3.0 AU terms.

evidence: The State Growth ArcGIS REST Geophysics service lists a Gravity Base Stations layer with Query and Data capabilities. The layer description says the stations are sites that may be precisely reoccupied by a gravity meter to tie gravity surveys to an absolute gravity datum, with absolute gravity values for Isogal65, Isogal84 and/or Australian Absolute Gravity Datum 2007. A returnCountOnly query on 2026-06-29 returned 176 records. The ArcGIS layer iteminfo exposes licenseInfo as Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 Australia Licence.
notes: Accepted in v075 as an official maintained base-station feature service supporting survey datum control. It is kept separate from the Gravity Measurements layer because base stations have different fields, datum-control purpose and record count. The general MRT digital-data page was excluded from the lychee URL list because lychee received 403; v075 instead used the layer iteminfo licence endpoint.
desc_zh: Mineral Resources Tasmania Gravity Base Stations Feature Layer 是 MRT/State Growth ArcGIS REST 地球物理服务中的重力基站图层。图层说明这些站点可由重力仪高精度复测，用于把重力调查联测到绝对重力基准，重力值涉及 Isogal65、Isogal84 和/或 Australian Absolute Gravity Datum 2007；2026-06-29 的服务端计数查询返回 176 条记录。v075 验证了 REST 图层、计数查询和 MRT 数据使用页，许可按 MRT Digital Data 条款为 CC BY 3.0 AU。
desc_en: Mineral Resources Tasmania Gravity Base Stations Feature Layer is the gravity base-station layer in the MRT/State Growth ArcGIS REST geophysics service. The layer describes precisely reoccupiable stations used to tie gravity surveys to absolute gravity datums, with values for Isogal65, Isogal84 and/or AAGD07; a server count query on 2026-06-29 returned 176 records. v075 verified the REST layer, count query and MRT data-use page under CC BY 3.0 AU terms.

evidence: The Geoscience Australia ISO metadata names Tasmanian Gravity Data (P198751), gravity point data within the NetCDF Ground Gravity Point Surveys Collection. The abstract states that the dataset contains 2,197 point data values acquired in Tasmania in 1987 at 100 to 1500 m spacing, processed and checked by GA geophysicists. Lineage text states EPSG:4283 coordinates, Australian Height Datum, AAGD07 gravity datum and gravity units in micrometres per second squared. The metadata lists a Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 International Licence, a THREDDS direct NetCDF file and OPeNDAP access; v075 verified the direct NetCDF by HEAD as 280,190 bytes.
notes: Accepted in v075 as a survey-level GA/NCI NetCDF point dataset. It is distinct from the MRT maintained statewide service because it is a specific 1987 GA survey record with its own metadata UUID, project number P198751, file path and 2,197-point NetCDF download.
desc_zh: Tasmanian Gravity Data P198751 Point Gravity Survey 是 Geoscience Australia 在 NCI THREDDS/GA 元数据中发布的塔斯马尼亚地面重力点数据。GA ISO 元数据说明该项目 1987 年采集，包含 2,197 个点值，站距约 100 至 1500 m，采用 EPSG:4283 坐标、AHD 高程和 AAGD07 重力基准，并经过 GA 地球物理人员质量检查。v075 验证了 GA 元数据、THREDDS 直接 NetCDF 下载和 OPeNDAP 服务，许可为 CC BY 3.0 International。
desc_en: Tasmanian Gravity Data P198751 Point Gravity Survey is a Geoscience Australia ground-gravity point dataset exposed through GA metadata and the NCI THREDDS archive. The ISO metadata says the 1987 Tasmania survey contains 2,197 point values at 100 to 1500 m spacing, with EPSG:4283 coordinates, AHD heights and AAGD07 gravity datum, and that the processed data were checked by GA geophysicists. v075 verified the GA metadata, THREDDS NetCDF download and OPeNDAP service under a CC BY 3.0 International licence.

evidence: The GSI research open-data page identifies JGEOID2024 as gravity geoid heights at grid over Japan, with resource format netCDF-4 (CF-1.7), publication date 2025-07-01 and version 1.0. The description says the model is an improved gravimetric geoid model developed by GSI, computed from GOCE-based GOCONS_GCF2_TIM_R6, surface land and ship-borne gravity, airborne gravity and SIO V32.1 altimetry-derived marine gravity, using a Stokes-Helmert remove-compute-restore approach. It states 1 x 1.5 arc-minute grid spacing, GRS80/W0 reference and approximately 3 cm accuracy from GNSS/leveling validation. v076 verified the landing page, GSI terms page and the direct NetCDF file by HEAD as 7,750,454 bytes.
notes: Accepted in v076 as the 2024 GSI successor/updated national gravimetric geoid model, distinct from the existing JGEOID2019 ISG row by version, publication date, landing page, direct NetCDF format and input model lineage. The landing page contains a minor coverage wording difference between description and geolocation; both are preserved rather than harmonized by inference.
desc_zh: GSI JGEOID2024 是日本国土地理院发布的日本及周边区域重力大地水准面模型。官方开放数据页说明该模型为 netCDF-4 (CF-1.7)，2025-07-01 发布、版本 1.0，网格间距 1 × 1.5 分角，基于 GOCE GOCONS_GCF2_TIM_R6、陆地/船载重力、航空重力和 SIO V32.1 卫星测高海洋重力场计算，并以 GNSS/水准验证显示约 3 cm 精度。v076 验证了 GSI 页面、使用条款页面和 7,750,454 字节的直接 NetCDF 下载。
desc_en: GSI JGEOID2024 is a Geospatial Information Authority of Japan gravimetric geoid model for Japan and surrounding areas. The official open-data page lists it as netCDF-4 (CF-1.7), publication date 2025-07-01, version 1.0, with 1 x 1.5 arc-minute spacing, computed from GOCE GOCONS_GCF2_TIM_R6, land and ship-borne gravity, airborne gravity and SIO V32.1 altimetry-derived marine gravity, and validated to about 3 cm against GNSS/leveling data. v076 verified the GSI page, terms page and the 7,750,454-byte direct NetCDF download.

evidence: The GSI landing page for Kobayashi et al. 2024 states that the dataset contains crustal deformation, gravity observation, gravity-estimated density structure, fault model and numerical simulation data for the 2016 Kumamoto earthquake. Its abstract says gravity data were obtained from campaign observations in the west of Aso caldera in 2019 and density contrast structure was estimated using campaign and existing gravity data. The English download page provides a Gravity section with `grav.dat`, ASCII columns Longitude, Latitude, Elevation and Gravity, observation dates 2019-11-25 to 2019-11-28 and units mGal, plus a gravity-inferred density contrast structure archive `density.tar.gz` containing netCDF files in kg/m3. v076 verified the landing page, download page, GSI terms page, DOI landing page, direct gravity ASCII file and density archive by HEAD/lychee.
notes: Accepted in v076 because gravity observation and gravity-inferred density structure are explicit delivered components, not merely incidental keywords. Non-gravity SAR, GNSS, fault-model and rupture-simulation files on the same landing page were deliberately excluded from the verified gravity URL list.
desc_zh: GSI Kobayashi et al. 2024 数据集包含 2016 年熊本地震研究中的重力观测和由重力反演的阿蘇カルデラ密度结构。官方下载页的 Gravity 部分提供 `grav.dat`，ASCII 列为经度、纬度、高程和重力，观测时间为 2019-11-25 至 2019-11-28，单位 mGal；同时提供 `density.tar.gz`，其中为按高程/深度组织的 netCDF 密度结构文件，单位 kg/m3。v076 验证了 GSI 登陆页、下载页、使用条款、论文 DOI、直接 ASCII 重力文件和 26,503,368 字节的密度归档。
desc_en: The GSI Kobayashi et al. 2024 dataset includes gravity observations and gravity-inferred density structure for the 2016 Kumamoto earthquake study. The official download page has a Gravity section with `grav.dat`, an ASCII file whose columns are longitude, latitude, elevation and gravity, observed from 2019-11-25 to 2019-11-28 in mGal, and `density.tar.gz`, a netCDF density-structure archive by elevation/depth in kg/m3. v076 verified the GSI landing page, download page, terms page, paper DOI, direct gravity ASCII file and 26,503,368-byte density archive.

evidence: The NTGS GEMIS record identifies the West Arnhem release as a Gravity Survey issued in 2026 and published by the Northern Territory Geological Survey. Its abstract states that the survey was funded through Resourcing the Territory and managed by Geoscience Australia on behalf of NTGS. The survey used a nominal 4 km square grid, with industry-funded 500 m x 500 m infill over selected areas, and the data package consists of 4,388 gravity stations as a point-located dataset plus grids of newly acquired gravity data over about 65,000 km2. The full metadata lists CC BY 4.0 attribution to the Northern Territory Geological Survey. v078 verified the simple and full GEMIS pages and the direct ZIP download by lychee/HEAD as 25,308,279 bytes.
notes: Accepted in v078 as a survey-level NTGS ground gravity release. It is distinct from Pine Creek 2025, Pedirka 2024 and NT-wide 2026 gridded stitch rows by survey area, GEMIS handle, station count, grid spacing, map-sheet coverage and data package filename.
desc_zh: NTGS West Arnhem Ground Gravity Survey 2026 是北领地地质调查局发布的 West Arnhem / 北部北领地区域地面重力调查数据包。GEMIS 元数据说明该调查由 Resourcing the Territory 计划资助，Geoscience Australia 代 NTGS 管理，采用 4 km 常规网格，并在局部区域由行业资金加密到 500 m x 500 m；数据包包含 4,388 个重力站点点位数据和新采集重力数据网格，覆盖约 65,000 平方公里。v078 验证了 GEMIS 元数据、完整元数据和 25,308,279 字节直接 ZIP 下载，许可为 CC BY 4.0。
desc_en: NTGS West Arnhem Ground Gravity Survey 2026 is a Northern Territory Geological Survey ground-gravity release for the West Arnhem / northern Northern Territory region. The GEMIS metadata says the survey was funded through Resourcing the Territory and managed by Geoscience Australia for NTGS, using a nominal 4 km grid with selected industry-funded 500 m x 500 m infill; the package contains 4,388 point-located gravity stations and grids of newly acquired gravity data over about 65,000 km2. v078 verified the GEMIS metadata, full metadata and 25,308,279-byte direct ZIP download under CC BY 4.0.

evidence: The Data WA CKAN record `gravity-400m-of-wa-v1-2020-dmirs-070` is open and licensed CC BY 4.0. Its notes describe Western Australia's gravity product as a merge of onshore spherical-cap Bouguer gravity anomalies and offshore free-air anomalies, with ground data over the continental region extracted from the Australian National Gravity Database and merged with airborne vertical gravity/gravity gradiometer surveys. The MAGIX GDA2020 folder states that the Point Gravity Dataset of Western Australia integrates ground gravity data sourced from the Australian National Gravity Database and subsampled airborne gravity data. v079 verified the Data WA API, MAGIX folder, direct GDA2020 point gravity ZIP and metadata ZIP with lychee/HEAD; the point ZIP is 46,894,423 bytes.
notes: Accepted in v079 as a point-gravity dataset distinct from the existing Western Australia Gravity Anomaly Grid row, which represents the gridded gravity anomaly product. The same MAGIX folder also contains GDA2020 Bouguer anomaly grid files; those were not added as a duplicate grid row because the existing catalog already represents the WA gravity anomaly grid product.
desc_zh: Point Gravity Dataset of Western Australia GDA2020 是西澳官方 MAGIX/GSWA 发布的州域点重力数据集。MAGIX GDA2020 文件夹说明该点数据集整合了 Australian National Gravity Database 的地面重力数据和抽样航空重力数据；Data WA 的相关 Gravity (400m) of WA v1 / DMIRS-070 记录标注为 open、CC BY 4.0，并说明该产品使用 ANGD 地面数据与航空重力/重力梯度测量资料。v079 验证了 Data WA API、MAGIX 文件夹、46,894,423 字节的点重力 ZIP 和 234,511 字节的元数据 ZIP。
desc_en: Point Gravity Dataset of Western Australia GDA2020 is an official Western Australian MAGIX/GSWA statewide point-gravity dataset. The MAGIX GDA2020 folder says the point dataset integrates ground gravity data from the Australian National Gravity Database and subsampled airborne gravity data; the related Data WA Gravity (400m) of WA v1 / DMIRS-070 record is open under CC BY 4.0 and describes use of ANGD ground data together with airborne gravity and gravity gradiometry surveys. v079 verified the Data WA API, MAGIX folder, 46,894,423-byte point gravity ZIP and 234,511-byte metadata ZIP.

evidence: The Zenodo record identifies the dataset as open, CC BY 4.0, and a dataset resource with DOI 10.5281/zenodo.15090241. Its description states that the Lithuanian historical gravity dataset consists of second and third order gravimetric network data and gravity survey data digitized from paper catalogues and 1:200,000 gravimetric map sheets, covering the total territory of Lithuania. It lists 123 gravimetric network stations and 10,660 gravity survey points, with final gravity in IGSN71, coordinates in ETRS89 EPSG:4258 and heights in EVRS2007 EPSG:5215. The ESSD 2026 article repeats these details, states measurements were carried out between 1951 and 1962, and cites the Zenodo dataset. v080 verified the Zenodo HTML/API pages, both DBF files, the readme and the ESSD paper with lychee/HEAD.
notes: Accepted in v080 as a European national historical point-gravity dataset. It is distinct from regional geoid/quasigeoid model rows because it provides raw/processed gravimetric network and survey point DBF tables rather than only derived geoid grids.
desc_zh: Lithuanian Countrywide Historical Gravity Dataset 是覆盖立陶宛全境的历史重力点数据集，由 Zenodo 发布并有 ESSD 2026 数据论文说明。数据由 1951-1962 年测量资料和 1:200,000 重力图纸质目录数字化而来，包含 123 个二/三等重力网点和 10,660 个重力测量点；最终数据采用 IGSN71 重力系统、ETRS89 坐标 EPSG:4258 和 EVRS2007 高程 EPSG:5215。v080 验证了 Zenodo HTML/API、两个 DBF 文件、readme 和 ESSD 论文页面，许可为 CC BY 4.0。
desc_en: The Lithuanian Countrywide Historical Gravity Dataset is a national historical point-gravity dataset for Lithuania, published on Zenodo and described in an ESSD 2026 data paper. The data were digitized from 1951-1962 measurements and 1:200,000 gravimetric map sheets, with 123 second/third-order gravimetric network stations and 10,660 gravity survey points; final data use the IGSN71 gravity system, ETRS89 coordinates EPSG:4258 and EVRS2007 heights EPSG:5215. v080 verified the Zenodo HTML/API pages, both DBF files, readme and ESSD paper under CC BY 4.0.

source_type: GFZ DOI dataset with direct files plus peer-reviewed ESSD data paper
evidence: GFZ Data Services identifies the resource as the released dataset The Pan-Alpine gravity database 2020, cites DOI 10.5880/fidgeo.2020.045, and lists CC BY 4.0. The abstract describes a homogenized Pan-Alpine compilation based on national gravity databases from ten countries, with a final quality-controlled input of 349,938 terrestrial gravity points and about 700,000 marine stations over roughly 2-23 degrees E and 41-51/52 degrees N. GFZ states that published grids are shared on a 4 km x 4 km grid, while 2 km x 2 km results are available on request and with consortium approval. The live download directory exposes a 3,807,820 byte ZIP data package and a 406,812 byte data-description PDF; ZIP inspection found Bouguer gravity anomaly, free-air gravity anomaly, bathymetric correction, mass correction, ellipsoidal height GRD grids, Pan-Alpine_Gravity_database_2020.dat, and the PDF description. v081 verified the GFZ metadata page, download directory, ZIP, PDF and ESSD paper with lychee/HEAD and checked that no existing row matched Pan-Alpine, AAGRG, Zahorec, DOI 10.5880/fidgeo.2020.045, or GFZ record 8039528e-3ada.
notes: Accepted in v081 as a canonical GFZ/DOI open dataset for the Pan-Alpine regional gravity field. Quality caveat: the metadata distinguishes the source point compilation from the public release; this row treats the openly available deliverables as the 4 km x 4 km grids and packaged DAT/GRD files, not as unrestricted access to all original national point datasets. It is distinct from geoid-only model rows and from national point-gravity rows because it provides regional gravity anomaly grids and a homogenized Pan-Alpine database package.
desc_zh: GFZ Pan-Alpine Gravity Database 2020 是 GFZ Data Services 发布的泛阿尔卑斯区域重力数据集，带 DOI 10.5880/fidgeo.2020.045 和 ESSD 2021 数据论文。GFZ 页面说明该成果基于十个国家的陆地重力数据库和海域资料进行统一处理，公开发布的主要成果为 4 km x 4 km 网格；下载 ZIP 中包含 Bouguer 重力异常、自由空气重力异常、质量/水深校正、椭球高等 GRD 网格，以及 Pan-Alpine_Gravity_database_2020.dat 和说明 PDF。v081 已核验 GFZ 元数据页、下载目录、ZIP、PDF 和 ESSD 页面；需注意 2 km x 2 km 成果需要申请/批准，原始国家点库不应被表述为完全开放。
desc_en: GFZ Pan-Alpine Gravity Database 2020 is an open GFZ Data Services DOI dataset associated with an ESSD 2021 data paper. The metadata describes a homogenized Pan-Alpine gravity compilation from ten national land-gravity databases plus marine data; the openly published deliverables are 4 km x 4 km grids, while finer 2 km x 2 km products require request and consortium approval. The verified ZIP package contains Bouguer and free-air gravity anomaly GRD grids, bathymetric and mass-correction grids, an ellipsoidal-height grid, Pan-Alpine_Gravity_database_2020.dat and the data-description PDF under CC BY 4.0.

evidence: GFZ Data Services lists the resource as a released dataset titled Hydrometerological and gravity data from the Argentine-German Geodetic Observatory in La Plata, cites DOI 10.5880/GFZ.5.4.2018.001, and records CC BY 4.0 rights. The GFZ abstract states that the dataset contains hydrological, meteorological and gravity time series collected at AGGO in La Plata, Argentina; gravity products include large-scale hydrological, oceanic and atmospheric effects, local hydrological effects, and gravity residuals suitable for model comparison. The readme repeats the CC BY 4.0 licence and defines Level 1 observed values, Level 2 pre-processed series and Level 3 model outputs. It lists gravity-related categories including ga global atmospheric gravity effect, gh global hydrological gravity effect, go global oceanic non-tidal ocean loading gravity effect, gr gravity observations/residuals, and lh local hydrological gravity effect, all in nm s^-2. HEAD checks verified the metadata page, download directory, 119,718,424 byte ZIP and 120,466 byte readme; ZIP inspection found 565 files, including time-series ZIPs such as timeseries_ga.zip, timeseries_gh.zip, timeseries_go.zip, timeseries_gr.zip and timeseries_lh.zip, database SQL scripts, documentation and plots. Dedup found no existing v081 match for AGGO hydrometeorological/gravity time series, La Plata, Mikolaj, or DOI 10.5880/GFZ.5.4.2018.001; the existing AGGOQG row is a separate Buenos Aires quasigeoid model.
notes: Accepted in v082 as a DOI-backed open observatory gravity time-series package. Quality caveat: the package is hydrometeorological plus gravity, not gravity-only; the catalog row focuses on its gravity products and retains hydrological/meteorological context because those variables are needed for local gravity corrections and residual interpretation. The original GFZ title spells Hydrometerological; the row preserves that title in theme_raw and uses a normalized English description elsewhere.
desc_zh: GFZ AGGO Hydrometerological and Gravity Time Series 2016-2018 是 GFZ Data Services 发布的阿根廷-德国大地测量观测站 La Plata 站点时间序列数据包，DOI 为 10.5880/GFZ.5.4.2018.001，许可为 CC BY 4.0。数据包含水文、气象和重力时间序列，其中重力相关产品包括全球大气重力效应、全球水文重力效应、海洋/非潮汐海洋重力效应、超导重力仪观测/残差以及局地水文重力效应，单位为 nm s^-2。v082 验证了 GFZ 元数据页、下载目录、119.7 MB ZIP 数据包和 readme，并抽查 ZIP 内容确认其包含 565 个文件和多个重力时间序列压缩文件。
desc_en: GFZ AGGO Hydrometerological and Gravity Time Series 2016-2018 is a GFZ Data Services DOI dataset for the Argentine-German Geodetic Observatory in La Plata, Argentina. It combines hydrological, meteorological and gravity time series, with gravity products covering atmospheric, global hydrological, oceanic/non-tidal-ocean, observed/residual and local hydrological gravity effects in nm s^-2. The verified open package provides Level 1 observations, Level 2 corrected series and Level 3 model outputs, including gravity-related time-series ZIP files, database scripts, documentation and plots under CC BY 4.0.

evidence: The Zenodo API record 14545565 identifies the resource as a dataset titled Global superconducting gravimeter observation residual dataset, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.14545565, with open access and CC BY 4.0 licence. The description states that it consists of gravity residual sequences from 59 observation records collected at 42 superconducting gravimeter stations worldwide, sourced from the International Geodynamics and Earth Tides Service database. It states that residuals are derived by removing modeled gravity contributions including tides, atmospheric effects, polar-motion and length-of-day induced gravity variations, plus instrumental perturbations such as steps, gaps and spikes. The compiled residual series span 26.75 years from 1 July 1997 to 29 February 2024 and are unified to hourly sampling intervals. v083 verified the Zenodo landing page, API page and direct ZIP content URL by HEAD/lychee; the file Content-Length is 29,328,861 bytes. Dedup found no existing v082 row matching Zenodo record 14545565, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.14545565, the exact title, or 59-record/42-station superconducting-gravimeter residual dataset.
notes: Accepted in v083 as a high-value global derived residual dataset from superconducting gravimeters. Quality caveat: this is a processed residual compilation derived from IGETS observations, not a replacement for raw IGETS station Level 1 data. Direct download was verified by HEAD/lychee, but full ZIP content listing was interrupted by slow transfer in this cycle; avoid claiming internal file schema until a later content inspection succeeds.
desc_zh: Global Superconducting Gravimeter Observation Residual Dataset 是 Zenodo 发布的全球超导重力仪观测残差数据集，作者为武汉大学 Wei Luan，DOI 为 10.5281/zenodo.14545565，许可为 CC BY 4.0。Zenodo 描述说明该数据集来自 IGETS 数据库，包含全球 42 个超导重力仪站的 59 条观测记录残差序列，时间跨度为 1997-07-01 至 2024-02-29，统一为小时采样。残差通过去除潮汐、大气效应、极移和日长引起的重力变化以及台阶、缺测、尖峰等仪器扰动获得；v083 已核验 Zenodo HTML/API 和 29.3 MB ZIP 直链。
desc_en: The Global Superconducting Gravimeter Observation Residual Dataset is a Zenodo open dataset by Wei Luan of Wuhan University, derived from IGETS superconducting-gravimeter records. It provides hourly gravity residual sequences from 59 observation records at 42 stations worldwide, spanning 1 July 1997 to 29 February 2024. The residuals remove modeled tides, atmospheric effects, polar-motion and length-of-day gravity variations, and instrumental perturbations such as steps, gaps and spikes; v083 verified the Zenodo landing/API pages and the 29.3 MB ZIP download under CC BY 4.0.

source_type: Zenodo open dataset with direct NetCDF/readme files
evidence: The Zenodo API record 14177000 identifies SDUST2023VGGA as a dataset with DOI 10.5281/zenodo.14177000 and CC BY 4.0 licence. Its description and readme state that SDUST2023VGGA is a global oceanic vertical gradient of gravity anomaly model on a 1 arc-minute by 1 arc-minute grid, covering latitudes from 80 degrees S to 80 degrees N. The readme states that the model was constructed using multi-directional mean sea surface data from DTU21MSS, with CNES-CLS22MDT and XGM2019e also listed as data sources, and that comparison with SIO V32.1 indicates high consistency for seafloor structure, ocean geophysics and mass-distribution studies. v084 verified the Zenodo landing page, API, readme.md content URL and SDUST2023VGGA.nc content URL with HEAD/lychee; the NetCDF Content-Length is 829,514,983 bytes and the readme is 1,466 bytes. Dedup found no existing v083 row matching SDUST2023VGGA, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.14177000, VGGA, or global oceanic vertical gradient of gravity anomaly; an existing SDUST2024GRA_IS2 row is a marine gravity anomaly model, not a vertical-gradient product.
notes: Accepted in v084 as a distinct global oceanic vertical-gradient gravity-anomaly product. Quality caveat: SDUST2023VGGA is derived from MSS/geophysical model inputs and comparison products, not an in-situ gravity observation database. Related SDUST2021GRA/SDUST2022GRA free-air gravity anomaly grids were not added in this cycle because the catalog already contains a newer SDUST2024GRA_IS2 marine gravity anomaly row; SDUST2023VGGA is kept because VGGA is a different delivered variable.
desc_zh: SDUST2023VGGA 是 Zenodo 发布的全球海洋垂向重力异常梯度（VGGA）模型，DOI 为 10.5281/zenodo.14177000，许可为 CC BY 4.0。数据为 1′×1′ 网格，覆盖 80°S 至 80°N，readme 说明其使用 DTU21MSS 多方向平均海面数据构建，并列出 CNES-CLS22MDT 与 XGM2019e 等输入/参考来源。v084 已核验 Zenodo HTML/API、readme 和 829.5 MB NetCDF 直链；该条与已有 SDUST2024GRA_IS2 海洋重力异常模型不同，记录的是垂向重力异常梯度产品。
desc_en: SDUST2023VGGA is a Zenodo open dataset providing a global oceanic vertical gradient of gravity anomaly model. It is distributed as a 1 arc-minute NetCDF grid covering 80 degrees S to 80 degrees N under CC BY 4.0. The readme states that the model uses multi-directional DTU21MSS mean sea surface data and lists CNES-CLS22MDT and XGM2019e among its sources; v084 verified the Zenodo landing/API pages, readme and 829.5 MB NetCDF download.

source_type: Zenodo open dataset with direct gravity grid files
evidence: The Zenodo API record 19689235 identifies the resource as a dataset titled Compiled geophysical dataset of the Mariana Trough, including bathymetry, magnetic anomaly, gravity anomaly, and seafloor age, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19689235, open access, with CC BY 4.0 licence. Its description lists eight gridded datasets for the Mariana Trough: bathymetry, backscatter intensity, magnetic anomaly, magnetization, seafloor age, mantle Bouguer anomaly, residual mantle Bouguer anomaly and crustal thickness. The gravity-specific files exposed by the Zenodo API are mariana_mba_sandwell_mask.grd and mariana_rmba_mask.grd. v085 verified the Zenodo landing page, API, mantle Bouguer anomaly grid and residual mantle Bouguer anomaly grid with HEAD/lychee; the two gravity file Content-Length values are 1,268,198 bytes and 219,262 bytes. Dedup found no existing v084 row matching Mariana Trough, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19689235, or these gravity anomaly grid filenames; the existing Guam/Northern Mariana xGEOID20A row is a broader geoid model, not this Mariana Trough mantle Bouguer anomaly compilation.
notes: Accepted in v085 because the record explicitly delivers gravity anomaly grids, even though it is a multi-variable geophysical compilation. Quality caveat: non-gravity layers such as bathymetry, backscatter, magnetic anomaly, magnetization, seafloor age and crustal thickness are not the reason for acceptance and are not treated as separate gravity datasets. A content-level file-type probe was attempted but interrupted by slow transfer; URL/size verification relies on Zenodo API and HEAD/lychee.
desc_zh: Mariana Trough Mantle and Residual Bouguer Gravity Anomaly Grids 是 Zenodo 2026 年发布的 Mariana Trough 区域综合地球物理栅格数据集中的重力部分，DOI 为 10.5281/zenodo.19689235，许可为 CC BY 4.0。完整记录包含 8 个栅格层，其中与重力直接相关的是 mantle Bouguer anomaly `mariana_mba_sandwell_mask.grd` 和 residual mantle Bouguer anomaly `mariana_rmba_mask.grd`。v085 已核验 Zenodo HTML/API 和两个重力 `.grd` 直链，文件大小分别为 1,268,198 bytes 和 219,262 bytes；其它水深、磁力、年龄和地壳厚度层仅作为多变量背景。
desc_en: The Mariana Trough Mantle and Residual Bouguer Gravity Anomaly Grids are the gravity-specific layers in a 2026 Zenodo regional geophysical compilation for the Mariana Trough. The open CC BY 4.0 record provides direct grid files for mantle Bouguer anomaly and residual mantle Bouguer anomaly, alongside non-gravity layers such as bathymetry, backscatter, magnetic anomaly, magnetization, seafloor age and crustal thickness. v085 verified the Zenodo landing/API pages and the two gravity grid downloads, with file sizes of 1,268,198 and 219,262 bytes.

desc_zh: PANGAEA RV YOKOSUKA YK18-07 Mado Megamullion Trackline Free-air Gravity Anomaly 是 Mado Megamullion 洋核杂岩及邻区的船载重力测线数据，DOI 为 10.1594/PANGAEA.960004，许可为 CC-BY-4.0。数据由 RV YOKOSUKA YK18-07 航次使用 LaCoste & Romberg S-63 船载重力仪获取，PANGAEA `textfile` 端点直接提供 8,501 个点的时间、经纬度和自由空气重力异常 FAA[mGal]。v087 已核验 PANGAEA 页面、文本数据端点、JSON-LD 元数据和 bundled publication；相关 gridded 产品 960002 因实际 `.grd` 文件访问尚未稳定验证，暂不入库。
desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset provides RV YOKOSUKA YK18-07 shipborne trackline free-air gravity anomaly data for the Mado Megamullion oceanic core complex and adjacent Philippine Sea area. The directly downloadable tab-delimited endpoint contains 8,501 records with date/time, longitude, latitude and FAA values in mGal, measured with a LaCoste & Romberg S-63 shipboard gravimeter. v087 verified the PANGAEA landing page, textfile data endpoint, JSON-LD metadata and bundled publication under CC-BY-4.0.

desc_zh: PANGAEA SONNE SO246 Chatham Rise AWI-20160400 Free-air Gravity Anomaly Profile 是 RV SONNE SO246 航次在 Chatham Rise 中部 AWI-20160400 地震折射剖面沿线采集/计算的自由空气重力异常数据，DOI 为 10.1594/PANGAEA.915611。PANGAEA `textfile` 端点直接提供 10,591 个 10 秒间隔记录，字段包括时间、纬度、经度和 FAA[mGal]。v088 已核验 PANGAEA 页面、文本数据端点和 JSON-LD 元数据；许可为 CC-BY-NC-4.0，带非商业限制，因此标记为 restricted-open 而非无条件开放。
desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset provides calculated free-air gravity anomaly data along seismic refraction profile AWI-20160400 from RV SONNE cruise SO246 on the central Chatham Rise, west of the Chatham Islands. The directly downloadable textfile contains 10,591 records at 10-second interval with date/time, latitude, longitude and FAA values in mGal. v088 verified the PANGAEA landing page, textfile endpoint and JSON-LD metadata; the licence is CC-BY-NC-4.0, so the row is marked as openly downloadable with a non-commercial reuse restriction.

evidence: The PANGAEA record 602273 identifies the dataset as Marine gravimetry along the track of POLARSTERN cruise ANT-XVIII/5a, DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.602273. Its JSON-LD metadata lists PANGAEA as publisher, Alfred Wegener Institute as source organization, temporal coverage from 2001-02-28T13:40:00 to 2001-04-10T23:50:00, size 5,964 data points, unrestricted access and CC-BY-3.0 licence. The PANGAEA textfile endpoint gives Date/Time, Latitude, Longitude and URL-to-raw-data-file fields, and the record comment states that a KSS31 gravity sensor was used, GPS/MINS supplied positions and attitude, simple Bouguer anomalies were calculated, missing gravity values are 999999.0, raw data are ASCII 24-hour files, and the recording interval is 10 seconds. v089 verified the all-files ZIP at https://hs.pangaea.de/grav/ps58/ant18_5a_grav_all.zip, listed one uncompressed file ant18_5a_grav_all.pmg of 28,768,320 bytes, and sampled rows containing cruise ID, date/time, latitude, longitude and numeric gravity/bathymetry fields. Individual daily raw file URLs exposed in the index returned HTTP 503 during probing, so the stable accepted download route is the all-files ZIP plus PANGAEA textfile/metadata endpoints. Dedup found no existing v088 row matching PANGAEA.602273, ANT-XVIII/5a, PS58/5a, or this POLARSTERN marine gravimetry title.
notes: Accepted in v089 as a real open PANGAEA marine-gravity observation package. Use the all-files ZIP as the verified direct data route; individual daily raw links listed inside the textfile were observed as unstable from this environment and should not be advertised as individually verified downloads without a later recheck.
desc_zh: PANGAEA POLARSTERN ANT-XVIII/5a Marine Gravimetry Raw Track Files 是 RV POLARSTERN ANT-XVIII/5a（PS58）航次的海洋重力测线数据，DOI 为 10.1594/PANGAEA.602273。PANGAEA 元数据给出 2001-02-28 至 2001-04-10 的南大洋/南太平洋航迹范围、5,964 个索引点、CC-BY-3.0 许可和直接数据入口。v089 已核验 all-files ZIP，并抽查到其中的 28.8 MB raw PMG ASCII 文件；记录说明使用 KSS31 重力仪、10 秒记录间隔，并包含简单布格异常等处理字段。
desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset contains marine gravimetry from RV POLARSTERN cruise ANT-XVIII/5a (PS58), published with DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.602273. The record covers a Southern Ocean and South Pacific track from 2001-02-28 to 2001-04-10, provides 5,964 indexed track/data-link records, and is licensed CC-BY-3.0. v089 verified the all-files ZIP and sampled its 28.8 MB raw PMG ASCII file; the PANGAEA metadata notes KSS31 gravity measurements, 10-second recording interval and simple Bouguer anomaly processing.

desc_en: This PANGAEA record provides a raw marine gravimetry track file from RV POLARSTERN cruise ARK-XIX/4a (PS64), DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.723114. The dataset is listed with unrestricted access under CC-BY-3.0 and has a directly downloadable gzip file; v090 verified a 15.8 MB compressed file that expands to 83.4 MB and contains 521,446 rows with time, coordinates and multiple numeric geophysical/navigation values. PANGAEA notes that the columns are not formally identified or validated, so the row is cataloged as a legacy raw gravity-track package rather than a fully standardized derived product.

evidence: The PANGAEA parent record 548400 identifies a dataset publication series titled Magnetic and gravity measurements on North-South profiles across the Grosse Meteor Bank, North Atlantic, with six datasets, unrestricted access and CC-BY-3.0 license. Its abstract states that gravity measurements yielded a density estimate for the Grosse Meteor Bank topographic masses and discusses measured free-air anomalies. v092 verified the parent ZIP endpoint with HTTP 200, Content-Length 15,945 bytes and filename fleischer_magnetic_gravity.zip; ZIP inspection found six tab-delimited profile tables M2_20017 through M2_20022 plus summary.txt. The sampled child DOI PANGAEA.474806 is part of the parent record and reports 479 data points. Its textfile endpoint returned HTTP 200, Content-Length 6,933 bytes and filename M2_20022_magnetic.tab. The sampled table explicitly contains Date/Time, Latitude, Longitude, bathymetric depth, magnetic field, Gravity [mGal], FAA [mGal], Bouguer [mGal] and QF columns with numeric gravity rows. Dedup found no existing v091 row matching PANGAEA.548400, Grosse Meteor Bank, or the child DOI/profile identifiers.
notes: Accepted in v092 as the canonical parent record for the six Grosse Meteor Bank magnetic/gravity profile tables. Individual child profile DOIs are represented through the parent access/evidence fields rather than separate rows to avoid fragmenting one publication series.
desc_zh: PANGAEA Grosse Meteor Bank Magnetic and Gravity North-South Profiles 是 1965 年 Meteor M2 航次穿越北大西洋 Grosse Meteor Bank 的 6 条南北向磁力/重力剖面数据系列，父 DOI 为 10.1594/PANGAEA.548400。v092 已核验父 ZIP 包，里面包含 6 个 tab 分隔剖面表和 summary；抽样子 DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.474806 的表格字段包括时间、纬经度、水深、磁场、Gravity[mGal]、FAA[mGal]、Bouguer[mGal] 和质量标记。该数据按 CC-BY-3.0 开放，作为父集合行收录，不把 6 个子剖面拆成重复条目。
desc_en: This PANGAEA publication series provides six north-south magnetic and gravity profile tables across the Grosse Meteor Bank in the North Atlantic from Meteor cruise M2 in 1965. v092 verified the parent ZIP bundle and sampled child DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.474806, whose table includes date/time, coordinates, bathymetry, magnetic field, Gravity, free-air anomaly, Bouguer anomaly and quality-flag columns. The dataset is available under CC-BY-3.0 and is cataloged as one canonical parent record to avoid splitting the six profile tables into duplicate rows.

(2025), A file of processed gravity data for the Rukwa-Tanganyika Rift Zone, including the sediment- and mantle-corrected gravity data and the Moho depth estimates derived from power spectral analysis, PANGAEA, DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.984227; supplement to Tectonics article DOI 10.1029/2024TC008722

scale: regional gridded/point processed gravity file for the Rukwa-Tanganyika Rift Zone; 0.033333-degree coordinate spacing visible in sampled rows; derived from WGM2012 Bouguer gravity with sediment and deep-mantle corrections and power-spectral Moho estimates
source_type: PANGAEA open processed gravity dataset and article supplement with directly downloadable table
evidence: The PANGAEA record 984227 identifies the dataset as processed gravity data for the Rukwa-Tanganyika Rift Zone, including sediment- and mantle-corrected gravity data and Moho depth estimates derived from power spectral analysis. The record states that Bouguer gravity data from the World Gravity Map 2012 were corrected for sediment and deep mantle effects, using CRUST1.0 sedimentary basins, S40RTS tomography scaled to density anomalies, and Gauss-Legendre Quadrature forward modelling. The textfile endpoint returned HTTP 200 with Content-Length 706,756 bytes and filename Njinju-etal_2025.tab. The PANGAEA data description lists 66,066 data points, CC-BY-4.0 license, enhanced curation, and coverage from 7 S to 10 S and 30 E to 34 E. Sampled rows contain the eight stated columns: Longitude, Latitude, Bouguer [mGal], sediment thickness [m], Moho depth [km], mantle gravity [mGal], sediment gravity effect [mGal], and combined deep-mantle/sediment gravity effect [mGal]. Dedup found no existing v092 row matching PANGAEA.984227, Rukwa-Tanganyika, Moho depth estimates, or mantle-corrected gravity.
notes: Accepted in v093 as an open, article-supplement processed gravity dataset. It is not raw terrestrial station gravity; it is a derived regional grid/table based on WGM2012 Bouguer gravity plus sediment and mantle corrections, with Moho-depth estimates. The source dependence on WGM2012 and modelling inputs is noted for reuse and quality interpretation.
desc_zh: PANGAEA Rukwa-Tanganyika Rift Zone Processed Gravity and Moho Depth Data 是东非裂谷西支 Rukwa-Tanganyika Rift Zone 的处理重力数据与 Moho 深度估计数据，DOI 为 10.1594/PANGAEA.984227。数据基于 WGM2012 布格重力，并对沉积层和深部地幔效应进行校正，同时给出由重力功率谱分析推算的 Moho 深度；PANGAEA `textfile` 端点直接提供 66,066 条记录。字段包括经纬度、Bouguer[mGal]、沉积厚度、Moho 深度、Mantle Gravity、Sediment Gravity Effect 和深部地幔/沉积综合重力效应，许可为 CC-BY-4.0。
desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset provides processed gravity data and Moho-depth estimates for the Rukwa-Tanganyika Rift Zone in the western branch of the East African Rift, DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.984227. It is derived from WGM2012 Bouguer gravity with sediment and deep-mantle corrections, and includes Moho-depth estimates from power spectral analysis. The directly downloadable textfile contains 66,066 records with coordinates, Bouguer gravity, sediment thickness, Moho depth, mantle gravity, sediment gravity effect and combined deep-mantle/sediment gravity effect under CC-BY-4.0.

evidence: The Zenodo record 15719153 is titled Marine onboard gravity data acquired in Project MARINEGEOHAZARD 2011.06 - 2012.06, on the Romanian and Bulgarian offshore, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.15719153, and lists license cc-by-4.0. The record description states that onboard gravity data were acquired during four sea cruises of R/V Mare Nigrum between June 2011 and June 2012 in the western Black Sea on Romanian and Bulgarian offshore areas, that observed gravity is in mGal, and that geophysical network lines are spaced 4 km apart. The Zenodo file inventory exposes four XYZ cruise files, a GRAV data description text file and a composite gravity anomaly map image. v094 sampled the GRAV description file, which states the cruises MN-093, MN-098, MN-099 and MN-104, Project MARINEGEOHAZARD, location Western Black Sea, survey including onboard gravimetry, gravimetry equipment Marine onboard gravity meter GMN-KM, coordinate system Geographic and UTM Zone 35N on WGS84, and responsible scientist Radu G. Dimitriu. v094 sampled all four XYZ files; each has the header Date, Time, Line, Longitude, Latitude, X_UTM35N, Y_UTM35N, Depth, Obs_Gravity and numeric rows with Obs_Gravity values in mGal. Dedup found no existing v093 row matching Zenodo.15719153, MARINEGEOHAZARD, Romanian/Bulgarian offshore, or Marine onboard gravity.
notes: Accepted in v094 as real shipborne observed gravity data. The JPG map is treated as a supporting visualization only; the four XYZ files are the primary data. Longitude/latitude strings in the sampled files use degree-minute-second-like dot-separated formatting, and UTM35N numeric coordinates are also provided.
desc_zh: Zenodo MARINEGEOHAZARD Western Black Sea Marine Onboard Gravity Data 是 2011-2012 年 R/V Mare Nigrum 在罗马尼亚和保加利亚近海开展 MARINEGEOHAZARD 项目期间采集的船载重力观测数据，DOI 为 10.5281/zenodo.15719153。数据包含 4 个航次 `.XYZ` 表格，字段包括日期、时间、测线、经纬度、UTM35N 坐标、水深和 Obs_Gravity；说明文件标明设备为 GMN-KM 船载重力仪，观测重力单位为 mGal，测线间距约 4 km。该记录以 CC-BY-4.0 开放，JPG 重力异常图仅作为辅助图件，主体数据是四个航次表格。
desc_en: This Zenodo record provides marine onboard gravity observations from the MARINEGEOHAZARD project, acquired by R/V Mare Nigrum on the Romanian and Bulgarian offshore sectors of the western Black Sea between June 2011 and June 2012. The four `.XYZ` cruise tables include date, time, line, longitude, latitude, UTM Zone 35N coordinates, depth and Obs_Gravity values in mGal; the accompanying description identifies the GMN-KM onboard gravity meter and WGS84/UTM35N coordinate systems. The dataset is licensed CC-BY-4.0, with the JPG gravity-anomaly map treated as supporting visualization rather than the primary data.

desc_en: This Zenodo record provides free-air gravity anomaly profile data from the continental margin to the oceanic basin north of the Daimao Seamount in the South China Sea, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.10275235. v095 verified the `FAA.data.zip` archive and inspected two plain-text profile files whose columns are distance (`dist`) and free-air anomaly (`FAA`) in mGal. The dataset is licensed CC-BY-4.0; because the archive contains profile-distance values rather than full coordinate grids, it should be treated as profile FAA data for reuse.

desc_en: This Zenodo record provides shipboard navigation and free-air gravity anomaly profiles over the Great Meteor Seamounts in the northeast Atlantic Ocean, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.15194329. The four ASCII `.xyg` files contain longitude, latitude and free-air gravity anomaly values in mGal; v096 sampled all four files and counted 4,379 non-empty numeric rows. The dataset is licensed CC-BY-4.0 and is cataloged separately from the older PANGAEA Grosse Meteor Bank magnetic/gravity profile series because the DOI record, authorship and file package are distinct.

A custom header parser found dimensions lon=481 and lat=481, global attributes COARDS/CF-1.0 and GMT 4.5.18, variables lon, lat and z, lon actual_range -37 to -29, lat actual_range 55 to 59, and z actual_range -5.657604 to 129.102234. desc_en: This Zenodo record provides a GMT/netCDF mantle Bouguer anomaly grid for the southern Reykjanes Ridge around the Bight Fracture Zone, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.18319302. v097 downloaded and parsed `srr.mba.grd`, confirming a classic NetCDF grid with lon=481, lat=481 and z values over -37 to -29 degrees longitude and 55 to 59 degrees latitude, with z ranging from about -5.66 to 129.10 mGal. The dataset is licensed CC-BY-4.0 and should be used as a derived regional MBA grid rather than raw gravity observations.

evidence: Zenodo API metadata reports DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20045786, creator Sai Jinyu, publication date 2026-05-06, CC-BY-4.0, and data compiled from NMDC, NCEI, and JAMSTEC. The processing-output ZIP HEAD and full temporary download succeeded; ZIP size is 529,550,640 bytes with MD5 02b443d17c98875a48fa56c3706d7299. ZIP inspection found 3,853 files and 8 directories, including final_statistics.csv and a final directory named 步骤6_交叉点平差后_最终状态 with 557 TXT track-line files. Final-state line counting found 8,871,880 data rows. Sample final file 01010038G.txt begins with header lon lat g_ship g_true and numeric rows such as 149.9876 0.9594 13.6180 6.4818. final_statistics.csv reports merged final dataset: 557 lines, 8,871,880 points, model-difference mean 0.4954 mGal, STD 4.0496 mGal, RMS 4.0797 mGal, and internal crossover RMS 3.3168 mGal.
notes: Accepted in v102 after controlled temporary download and ZIP inspection. The source compiles NMDC, NCEI, and JAMSTEC shipborne gravity data and applies systematic corrections using SWOT_02 as a reference. The catalog row represents the final corrected track-line dataset, not every intermediate processing stage. Large ZIP was inspected in a temporary directory and not copied into the project data directory.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集提供中国海及邻区（100°E-150°E、0°N-55°N）的质量控制船载自由空气重力异常测线数据，整合 NMDC、NCEI 和 JAMSTEC 公开来源并进行系统误差修正。受控拆检显示最终平差目录含 557 个测线文本文件、8,871,880 条数据行，字段为 lon、lat、g_ship、g_true，最终合并数据集内部交叉点 RMS 为 3.3168 mGal，许可证为 CC-BY-4.0。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides quality-controlled shipborne free-air gravity anomaly track-line data for the China Sea and adjacent areas (100°E-150°E, 0°N-55°N), compiled from NMDC, NCEI, and JAMSTEC public sources with systematic corrections. Controlled ZIP inspection found a final adjusted directory with 557 TXT track-line files and 8,871,880 data rows using lon, lat, g_ship, and g_true columns; the merged final dataset reports an internal crossover RMS of 3.3168 mGal and is released under CC-BY-4.0.

notes: Absolute-gravity values measured with an FG5-210 absolute gravimeter. License is CC-BY-NC-4.0, so reuse is openly downloadable but noncommercially restricted.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集提供日本西部樱岛火山 Harutayama Observatory 在 2010-2011 年用 FG5-210 绝对重力仪观测的绝对重力时序。两个 TXT 文件共包含 3,185 条数值记录，字段包括 UTC 年、年积日、参考重力值、残差重力值、标准误差和 drop 数量；参考值与残差相加得到观测绝对重力。数据带 DOI 和直接下载链接，但采用 CC-BY-NC-4.0 许可，存在非商业使用限制。
desc_en: This Zenodo record provides absolute gravity time-series measurements from Harutayama Observatory, Sakurajima Volcano, western Japan, observed with an FG5-210 absolute gravimeter during 2010-2011. The two TXT files contain 3,185 numeric records with UTC year/day, reference gravity, residual gravity, standard error, and drop count; reference plus residual gives the measured absolute gravity. The dataset has a DOI and direct download links, but it is licensed under CC-BY-NC-4.0 and therefore carries a noncommercial reuse restriction.

desc_zh: 该 USGS/ScienceBase 数据集提供内华达州中 Carson River basin 的点状重力站数据，来源于 USGS Scientific Investigations Report 2011-5055 的图 7，并附带 641 个来自 USGS Data Series 42 的 Nevada 参考站点。下载包为 shapefile，包含 736 个点，字段包括高程、观测重力和完整 Bouguer 异常，适合用于盆地结构、地下水与区域重力建模的资料追溯。元数据列明访问约束为 None，并要求在衍生产品中致谢 USGS 和 Bureau of Reclamation。
desc_en: This USGS/ScienceBase dataset provides point gravity stations for the middle Carson River basin, Nevada, as published in figure 7 of USGS Scientific Investigations Report 2011-5055, with 641 selected Nevada reference stations from USGS Data Series 42. The downloadable shapefile contains 736 point records with elevation, observed gravity, and complete Bouguer anomaly fields, supporting basin-structure, groundwater, and regional gravity modeling workflows. The FGDC metadata lists no access constraints and requests acknowledgment of the USGS and Bureau of Reclamation in derived products.

desc_zh: 该 USGS/ScienceBase 数据集提供 Tucson Basin 与 Avra Valley 2016、2018、2019 年重复微重力网络平差结果，用于估计含水层储量变化。下载包包含 CSV、点 shapefile、FGDC XML 和版本历史；解析结果为 69 个站点，字段包括各年份重力值及标准差、2016-2018、2018-2019 和 2016-2019 的等效自由水厚度变化及不确定度。该版本为 2.0，包含 2019 年新增数据，并说明对 3 个 2018_g 值因地表高程变化作了 3 microgal 调整。
desc_en: This USGS/ScienceBase release provides network-adjusted repeat microgravity results for Tucson Basin and Avra Valley, Arizona, for 2016, 2018, and 2019, supporting aquifer-storage change estimation. The download contains CSV, point shapefile, FGDC XML, and version history files; deterministic parsing found 69 stations with annual gravity values and standard deviations plus equivalent free-water-thickness changes for 2016-2018, 2018-2019, and 2016-2019. Version 2.0 adds 2019 data and documents a 3 microgal adjustment to three 2018_g values for land-surface elevation changes.

desc_en: This USGS/ScienceBase release is the Southwest Gravity Program backbone absolute-gravity database for monitoring and modeling groundwater-storage change. The 2025-12-19 version provides station metadata, measurement-level gravity values, a changelog, and FGDC metadata. Deterministic parsing found 331 station records and 2,009 absolute-gravity measurement records with station ID, NAD83 coordinates, NAVD88 elevation, date/time, setup and transfer heights, vertical gradient, gravity, uncertainty, set scatter, and number of sets; all downloaded file MD5 hashes matched the ScienceBase inventory.

desc_zh: 该 USGS/ScienceBase 数据集提供 Phoenix, Arizona 2020-2023 年重复微重力网络平差结果，用于评估含水层储量变化和储水性质。数据来自相对重力与 A-10 绝对重力观测的联合平差，CSV 中有 105 个非空站点记录，并给出 2020、2021、2022、2023 四期重力值及标准差。下载文件 MD5 与 ScienceBase 清单匹配；源 CSV 有 2 个空行，并有 1 个站点经度符号疑似异常，已在质量说明中保留记录。
desc_en: This USGS/ScienceBase release provides network-adjusted repeat microgravity results for Phoenix, Arizona, from 2020 to 2023 to evaluate aquifer-storage change and storage properties. The dataset combines relative-gravity and A-10 absolute-gravity surveys and provides annual adjusted gravity values and standard deviations for 105 nonblank station records. The downloaded file MD5 hashes matched the ScienceBase inventory; the source CSV includes two blank trailing rows and one station longitude sign anomaly, both documented as quality notes.

desc_en: This USGS/ScienceBase release provides network-adjusted repeat microgravity results for Albuquerque and Bernalillo County, New Mexico, in version 4.0 from June 2025. The download contains a CSV table, FGDC XML metadata, a version-history note, and a map image; deterministic parsing found 75 stations and 19 survey-date gravity/standard-deviation column pairs from 2016-06-09 through 2025-02-11. Version 4.0 adds three surveys from 2023-2025 and notes that no data were collected in 2022.
